insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook on checkout UI extensions is deprecated as of version 2026-07. The block_progress capability it depends on is also deprecated. Existing extensions will continue to work, but new extensions should not use this hook.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should stop using the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook and the block_progress capability in new checkout UI extensions. Existing extensions will still work, but it's recommended to update them to ensure future compatibility. Developers should review the Checkout UI extensions documentation for alternative approaches.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may not notice any immediate changes, but updated extensions will ensure a smoother checkout experience.
insight.why_it_matters: This deprecation ensures that checkout UI extensions are future-proof and compatible with upcoming Shopify changes.
insight.code_example: import { useBuyerJourneyIntercept } from '@shopify/checkout-ui-extensions'; // deprecated, do not use

also_worth_knowing.text: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, allowing extensions to observe POS events and run background logic without rendering any UI surface.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners has started, aiming to increase trust in the Shopify Partner ecosystem.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing has been updated with more plans, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events.

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions now use per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts, starting with API version 2026-07.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions now result in fewer breaking changes, giving server-side code more control over field mismatches.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically on every execution, using the latest URL after app redeployment.
CLI version 4.4.0 has been released, with updates to App Update, GCS bundle upload validation, and long URL wrapping fixes.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: Updated App Store Requirements: All apps must use honest and transparent review practices, as outlined in policy 1.3.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: Customer Account API: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout types are removed in API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for sub-region markets in the Admin GraphQL API.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill, starting in API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Deprecating the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions
updates.summary: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated, starting in version 2026-07.

recap.headline: Shopify updates POS extensions, app pricing, and Flow with new features and requirements

themes.title: POS Extensions and UI Updates
themes.detail: POS Extensions now support background extension targets, and POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 introduces per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts. These updates enable more flexible and powerful POS integrations.

themes.title: App Pricing and Partnerships
themes.detail: App Pricing has been updated with increased plan limits, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events. Additionally, identity verification for Shopify Partners has started to ensure trust in the ecosystem.

themes.title: Shopify Flow and App Development
themes.detail: Shopify Flow has introduced changes to Action extensions, resulting in fewer breaking changes, and Action runtime URLs now update automatically. The CLI has also been updated to version 4.4.0 with various fixes and improvements.

actions.text: Update POS UI extensions to use per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
Review and comply with updated App Store Requirements, including honest and transparent review practices
Migrate from deprecated Customer Account API fields before version 2026-10
